name: 48-Hour Onboarding Flow
target: 90% of new members complete all 8 steps within 48 hours
principle: First impression determines retention. Make Day 1 a QUICK WIN, not an operating system to learn.

gradual_task_introduction.day_1_to_3: 3 tasks only: accent drill + speaking mission + community hello
gradual_task_introduction.why: Prevents overwhelm. First experience = quick win, not operating system to learn on top of a new language.

steps.title: Application Form
steps.channel: Google Form or Discord DM bot prompt
steps.message_en:
Welcome! Before we place you in the right level, please answer these quick questions:

1. What is your name?
2. Why do you want to learn English? (work / travel / confidence / exam / other)
3. How much time can you commit daily? (15 min / 30 min / 45 min / 60+ min)
4. Have you studied English before? (never / a little / years but can't speak / intermediate)
5. What is your biggest challenge with English?

This takes 2 minutes. Your answers help us build the perfect plan for YOU.
steps.message_ar:
أهلاً! قبل ما نحدد مستواك، جاوب على هذي الأسئلة السريعة:

١. ما اسمك؟
٢. ليش تبي تتعلم إنجليزي؟ (عمل / سفر / ثقة / اختبار / غيره)
٣. كم وقت تقدر تخصص يوميًا؟ (١٥ دقيقة / ٣٠ / ٤٥ / ٦٠+)
٤. هل درست إنجليزي قبل؟ (أبدًا / شوي / سنوات بس ما أتكلم / متوسط)
٥. إيش أكبر تحدي عندك بالإنجليزي؟

يأخذ دقيقتين. إجاباتك تساعدنا نبني خطة مثالية لك.

steps.title: Welcome Message + What to Expect
steps.message_en:
🏛️ Welcome to Empire English, {NAME}!

Here's what happens next:

1️⃣ NOW: You'll take a short placement test (10-15 min)
2️⃣ WITHIN 6 HOURS: You'll get your level + personalized plan
3️⃣ WITHIN 12 HOURS: Your buddy will message you
4️⃣ WITHIN 24 HOURS: Orientation voice session (30 min)
5️⃣ TOMORROW: Your first day of tasks begins!

📖 In the meantime, please read #rules and #roles-info.

This is NOT a course. It's a daily system. 45-60 minutes/day.
The system works when you work it. Consistency > perfection.

React with ✅ when you've read #rules.
steps.message_ar:
🏛️ أهلاً فيك في Empire English يا {NAME}!

هذا اللي بيصير:

١️⃣ الحين: اختبار تحديد مستوى قصير (١٠-١٥ دقيقة)
٢️⃣ خلال ٦ ساعات: بتحصل على مستواك + خطة مخصصة
٣️⃣ خلال ١٢ ساعة: البدي (الرفيق) بيتواصل معك
٤️⃣ خلال ٢٤ ساعة: جلسة توجيهية صوتية (٣٠ دقيقة)
٥️⃣ بكرة: أول يوم مهام يبدأ!

📖 بينما تنتظر: اقرأ #rules و #roles-info.

هذا مو كورس. هذا نظام يومي. ٤٥-٦٠ دقيقة/يوم.
النظام يشتغل لمّا أنت تشتغل. الاستمرارية > الكمال.

تفاعل بـ ✅ لمّا تقرأ القوانين.

steps.title: Placement Assessment

pilot_version.method: Simplified: 7-question quiz (from Telegram bot) + 60-second voice recording + 5 written sentences
pilot_version.voice_prompt: Record yourself speaking English for 60 seconds. Talk about: your name, where you're from, your family, and why you want to learn English. It's okay to make mistakes — just speak!
pilot_version.voice_prompt_ar: سجّل نفسك تتكلم إنجليزي لمدة ٦٠ ثانية. تكلّم عن: اسمك، من وين أنت، عائلتك، وليش تبي تتعلم إنجليزي. عادي تغلط — المهم تتكلم!
pilot_version.writing_prompt: Write 5 sentences in English about yourself. (name, country, job/school, family, goal)
pilot_version.writing_prompt_ar: اكتب ٥ جمل بالإنجليزي عن نفسك. (اسم، بلد، عمل/دراسة، عائلة، هدف)

steps.full_version: Use the complete 45-minute diagnostic from module1-4 JSON files (Phase 2+)
steps.completion_trigger: Assessment submitted (voice recording + written sentences received)

steps.title: Level Assignment + Study Plan
steps.completion_trigger: Auto — sent after founder assigns level

steps.title: Buddy Contact
steps.buddy_message_template:
Hey {NAME}! 👋

I'm {BUDDY_NAME}, your onboarding buddy.

My job is to help you get started and answer any questions.

A few things:
• Tomorrow morning at 6AM you'll see your first tasks in #{TASK_CHANNEL}
• Start with just 3 tasks (accent + speaking + community)
• Don't worry about being perfect — just show up
• Message me ANYTIME if you're confused or stuck

Quick question: what time zone are you in? (so I know when you're awake)

Looking forward to seeing you grow! 💪
steps.buddy_message_template_ar:
أهلا {NAME}! 👋

أنا {BUDDY_NAME}، رفيقك في البداية.

شغلي أساعدك تبدأ وأجاوب أي أسئلة.

أشياء مهمة:
• بكرة الصبح ٦ بتشوف أول مهامك في #{TASK_CHANNEL}
• ابدأ بـ ٣ مهام فقط (نطق + كلام + مجتمع)
• لا تقلق عن الكمال — المهم تحضر
• راسلني أي وقت لو تحتاج شي

سؤال سريع: أنت بأي منطقة زمنية؟

متحمس أشوف تقدمك! 💪
steps.pilot_note: In pilot, founder is the buddy for all members.

steps.title: Orientation Voice Session
session_agenda: 5 min: Welcome + ice breaker (everyone says their name + goal in English)
10 min: How the system works (7 daily tasks, streak tracking, weekly assessment)
5 min: Discord tour (which channels to use, where to submit)
5 min: Common questions + fears ('What if I miss a day?' 'What if my English is terrible?')
5 min: First task demo (do a mini accent drill together live)
session_agenda_ar: ٥ دقائق: ترحيب + كل واحد يقول اسمه وهدفه
key_messages: Consistency > perfection. 15 minutes every day > 3 hours once a week.
It's okay to make mistakes — that's literally how you learn.
The community is here to support you, not judge you.
If you get stuck, message your buddy. Never suffer in silence.
steps.completion_trigger: Attended session (or watched recording if missed)

steps.title: First Day of Tasks (Simplified)
first_day_tasks: Task 1: Accent drill (10 min) — practice today's target sounds
Task 2: Speaking mission (5 min) — record 30 seconds introducing yourself
Task 3: Community (5 min) — say hello in #introductions (one sentence in English)
first_day_tasks_ar: مهمة ١: تدريب نطق (١٠ دقائق) — تمرّن على أصوات اليوم
مهمة ٢: مهمة كلام (٥ دقائق) — سجّل ٣٠ ثانية تعرّف فيها عن نفسك
مهمة ٣: مجتمع (٥ دقائق) — قول أهلاً في #introductions (جملة وحدة بالإنجليزي)
steps.message_en:
🌅 DAY 1 — Your journey begins!

Today is intentionally EASY. Just 3 tasks (~20 min total).
The full 7-task loop starts on Day 4. Today: quick wins.

{TASKS}

When done with each: type `!done accent` / `!done speaking` / `!done community`

You've got this! Your buddy {BUDDY} is watching for your first submission. 🏛️
steps.completion_trigger: At least 2 of 3 tasks submitted via !done

steps.title: First Checkpoint
steps.buddy_checkpoint_message:
Hey {NAME}! 🎯

How was Day 1?

{IF_COMPLETED}Great job! You did {COMPLETED_COUNT}/3 tasks. That's a fantastic start.
{IF_NOT_COMPLETED}I noticed you haven't submitted yet — no pressure! Just checking if you need help with anything.

Quick questions:
1. Was anything confusing? (about the system, the tasks, Discord?)
2. How did it feel? (easy/okay/hard/overwhelming?)
3. Any questions?

Remember: tomorrow adds 2 more tasks (vocabulary + writing). Still only ~40 minutes.

Full 7-task loop starts Day 4. You're building the habit one step at a time. 💪

fail_safes.stuck_at_step_1: If no form submitted after 6 hours → founder DMs directly with simplified questions
fail_safes.stuck_at_step_3: If no assessment after 12 hours → founder offers voice call placement (5 min)
fail_safes.stuck_at_step_5: If buddy gets no response after 24 hours → founder reaches out personally
fail_safes.stuck_at_step_7: If no Day 1 tasks submitted → buddy sends encouraging message + offers to do first task together on voice
fail_safes.general: If any step is stuck 24+ hours beyond schedule → personal founder outreach. The goal is never to lose someone to silence.

success_metric: ≥8 of 10 pilot members complete all 8 steps within 48 hours
